# H&L Junk Removal & Hauling Solutions, LLC

> Fully insured junk removal, hauling, and cleanout company based in League City, Texas, serving Galveston County and south Harris County. Free, no-obligation quotes on every job. Call or text 832-425-7749.

H&L Junk Removal & Hauling Solutions, LLC is a locally owned and fully insured junk removal and hauling business. We make getting rid of unwanted items simple and stress free for homeowners and businesses across the Bay Area Houston region. We show up on time, work fast, and clean up after ourselves.

## Key facts
- Business name: H&L Junk Removal & Hauling Solutions, LLC
- Location: League City, TX 77573
- Phone and text: 832-425-7749
- Website: https://hljunkremovalandhauling.com
- Fully insured (certificate of insurance available for commercial clients)
- Free, no-obligation quotes on every job (pricing depends on volume and item type, so we give a free upfront quote rather than list flat prices)
- Google rating: 5.0 stars
- Locally owned and operated
- Last updated: 2026-07-03

## Profiles
- Google Business Profile and reviews: https://g.page/r/CUoEnjQdISJpEBM
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/h.l_junk.removal/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61589177706129

## Services
- Residential and commercial junk removal
- Furniture removal and haul-off
- Appliance removal (refrigerators, freezers, washers, dryers, and air conditioners, with refrigerant handled properly)
- Garage, attic, shed, and estate cleanouts
- Foreclosure, eviction, and REO cleanouts
- Construction and demolition debris removal
- Light demolition (sheds, decks, fences)
- Storm and hurricane debris cleanup and haul-off
- Yard waste, mattress, and hot tub removal
- Property management and turnover cleanouts

## Service area
League City, Clear Lake, Webster, Friendswood, Dickinson, Texas City, Galveston, Seabrook, Kemah, Nassau Bay, La Marque, Santa Fe, Bacliff, San Leon, Pasadena, Pearland, and the surrounding Bay Area Houston communities in Galveston County and south Harris County, Texas.

## Why choose H&L
- Fully insured, which protects your home, property, and crew on every job
- Local crew with fast scheduling, often same day or next day
- Free, honest, no-obligation quotes with no hidden fees
- Handles everything from a single item to a full property cleanout
